zh.Wartling, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可瓦特林
zh.Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾羅克 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Sackville於1174年出生在英國艾可布勒斯時，她的父親Jeffrey de Saukeville39歲，母親Constantia Brooke26歲。她於1179年與William de St Leger在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Wartling, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可瓦特林
zh-hans.Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾羅克 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Sackville于1174年出生在英国艾可布勒斯时，她的父亲Jeffrey de Saukeville39岁，母亲Constantia Brooke26岁。她于1179年与William de St Leger在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Sackville was born in 1174, in Bures, Essex, England, her father, Jeffrey de Saukeville, was 39 and her mother, Constantia Brooke, was 26. She married William de St Leger in 1179, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Sackville est née en 1174, à Bures, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Jeffrey de Saukeville, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Constantia Brooke, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William de St Leger en 1179, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Sackville 1174 in Bures, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jeffrey de Saukeville 39 und ihre Mutter Constantia Brooke 26. Sie hat 1179 in Essex, England, United Kingdom William de St Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Sackville è nata il nel 1174 nel Bures, Essex, England, sua padre, Jeffrey de Saukeville, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Constantia Brooke, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William de St Leger nel 1179, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Sackvilleが1174年にイギリスエセックスブレスで生まれた時，父Jeffrey de Saukevilleは39歳，母Constantia Brookeは26歳であった。1179年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでWilliam de St Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Sackville(이)가 1174년 영국 에세스 버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jeffrey de Saukeville(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constantia Brooke(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 William de St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Wartling, Sussex, England: Wartling, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Sackville nasceu em 1174, em Bures, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jeffrey de Saukeville, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Constantia Brooke, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William de St Leger em 1179, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Sackville родилась в 1174 г. в местности буресь, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Jeffrey de Saukeville было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Constantia Brooke, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de St Leger в 1179 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Sackville nació en 1174, en Bures, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Jeffrey de Saukeville, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Constantia Brooke, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William de St Leger en 1179, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
